title: Jeff Brown
compiled_truth: Jeff Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-11-29), Jeff Brown sent 23 and received 293 emails, totalling 316 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (16), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (13), [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (9), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (8), [Joe Hartsoe](people/joe-hartsoe) (8). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_objectives, deleted_items.
